# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [Unreleased]

<!-- Entries generated by scripts/changelog-gen.py -->

## [1.2.0] - 2026-03-19

### Added

**5 new skills (auto-invocable via YAML frontmatter):**
- `code-review` ‚Äî 9 specialized agents in parallel (test runner, linter, security, quality, performance, dependency, test quality, simplification, code reviewer) ‚Üí verdict Ready/Needs Attention/Needs Work
- `writer-reviewer` ‚Äî bias-free review pattern: implement in current session, review in fresh context
- `two-correction` ‚Äî stops correction loops after 2 identical mistakes, restarts with improved prompt
- `epic-start` ‚Äî scaffolds a GitHub Issue as isolated git worktree with TASK.md
- `epic-merge` ‚Äî pre-merge validation, PR creation, worktree cleanup

**2 new workflows:**
- `riper.md` ‚Äî Research ‚Üí Innovate ‚Üí Plan ‚Üí Execute ‚Üí Review methodology with explicit gates
- *(4 workflows from v1.1.0 promoted: `multi-agent-worktrees`, `context-handoff`, `notebook-review`, `cost-dashboard`)*

**1 new agent:**
- `memory-curator` ‚Äî consolidates learning.md, deduplicates entries, promotes patterns to skills

**`gen.py` additions:**
- `.claudeignore` generated per stack (Python, JS/TS, Go, Rust, Java)
- Nested `CLAUDE.md` stubs for monorepos (`packages/`, `apps/`, `services/`)
- `Notification` hook ‚Äî desktop + audio notification when Claude needs attention
- `SubagentStop` hook ‚Äî logs subagent completion to `.template/agent-events.jsonl`
- `observability.sh` ‚Äî PostToolUse event log for audit trail
- `--target cursor` ‚Äî generates `.cursorrules` from manifest
- Model routing (`model_routing{}` in manifest ‚Äî sonnet/opus/haiku per task type)
- Security deny rules (`BASE_DENY_PATTERNS` in settings.local.json)
- `AGENTS.md` copy of CLAUDE.md for Cursor/Codex/Amp/Jules compatibility

**`install.sh`:** full audit before copy ‚Äî detects existing settings, MCP servers, custom hooks/agents/workflows; never silently overwrites; `cp -n` on agents and workflows; CLAUDE.md backed up if different

**Hooks improvements:**
- `pre-compact.sh` ‚Äî saves session context to `.template/session-backup.md` before compaction
- `post-edit.sh` ‚Äî radon cyclomatic complexity (Python), prompt injection scan, `.env` file block; now Edit/Write only (not Read)
- `stop.sh` ‚Äî session summary file, `usage.jsonl` log, OS + audio notification, `auto-learn --deduplicate`
- `session-start.sh` ‚Äî docs auto-detect (docs/, spec/, adr/), configurable injection (`context.docs_paths[]`), devcontainer/SSH detection, auto-start setup interview when manifest empty

**`auto-learn.py`:** confidence scoring (0.5‚Üí0.75‚Üí0.95), `--record-pattern` / `--evolve` flags, skill promotion to `.claude/skills/`

**`self-improve.py`:** session count heuristic fixed (unique days instead of entries/3)

**`CLAUDE.md`:** modular refactor with `@import` (agents-table, workflows-table, security-layers), Plan Mode guidance, context management rules (compact at 70%, two-correction rule, /batch /loop)

**`project.manifest.json`:** `claude_native_integrations[]`, `model_routing{}`, `context.compact_focus`, full agent/workflow lists

### Fixed

- `pre-bash-guard.sh` f-string bug: pattern name now correctly interpolated via `sys.argv[1]`
- `stop.sh` duplicate self-improve call (invalid `--type`/`--note` args) removed
- `post-edit.sh` false positives on Read operations and claudekit source files
- `.template/version.json` missing `source` field
- `install.sh` KNOWN_HOOKS and CLAUDEKIT_WORKFLOWS lists were outdated (missing 4 hooks, 8 workflows)

## [1.1.0] - 2026-03-18

### Added

**2 new agents (16 total):**
- `cost-analyst` ‚Äî cloud cost optimization (AWS/GCP/Azure), LLM token reduction, rightsizing, reserved instances, budget alerts
- `spec-reader` ‚Äî reads any spec document (PDF, MD, Notion, email) ‚Üí manifest + backlog + GitHub issues

**10 new workflows (22 total):**
- `a-b-test.md` ‚Äî power analysis, feature flag rollout, statistical significance, ship/kill/continue gate
- `data-quality.md` ‚Äî Great Expectations, dbt tests, ISO 8000 quality score, SLA monitoring
- `llm-eval.md` ‚Äî RAGAS, hallucination detection, BLEU/ROUGE, human eval (Cohen's Œ∫), deploy gate
- `spec-to-project.md` ‚Äî cahier des charges ‚Üí manifest + learning.md + backlog + arch + GitHub issues
- `code-review.md` ‚Äî structured PR review (BLOCKER/WARNING/SUGGESTION) ‚Üí `gh pr review`
- `monitoring-setup.md` ‚Äî Prometheus/Grafana/Loki/Jaeger/Sentry ‚Üí dashboards + SLOs + alerts
- `cost-optimization.md` ‚Äî cloud + LLM audit ‚Üí recommendations by ROI + budget alerts + FinOps tagging
- `dependency-audit.md` ‚Äî CVE scan + license check + phantom deps ‚Üí report without modifying

**`gen.py`:** `--dry-run`, `--diff`, Pulumi, Deno 2.x, Nx affected, 8 new intents (23 total), auto-installs `pre-push` git hook

**`scripts/claudekit.py`:** unified CLI ‚Äî validate, check, gen, bump, status, install

**`scripts/migrate-template.py`:** automatic manifest migration between versions (1.0.x ‚Üí 1.1.0 ‚Üí ...)

**`auto-learn.py`:** `--deduplicate` flag for cross-session deduplication

**`.claude/hooks/pre-push.sh`:** git pre-push hook ‚Äî secret scan + lint + tests before every push

**`examples/`:** 2 new pre-filled manifests ‚Äî `iac.manifest.json` (Terraform+AWS+EKS), `cli.manifest.json` (Python+Typer+PyPI)

## [1.0.0] - 2026-03-18

### Added

- 14 specialized agents (architect, reviewer, tester, deployer, explorer, security-auditor, debug-detective, doc-writer, performance-analyst, release-manager, data-engineer, ml-engineer, devops-engineer, template-improver) ‚Äî each with HANDOFF JSON output contract + project-type checklists
- 14 end-to-end workflows (feature, bugfix, hotfix, release, security-audit, dependency-update, refactor, onboard, self-improve, db-migration, incident-response, performance-baseline, publish-package, api-design)
- 5 hooks: `session-start` (40+ stack markers, 7 operational signals), `user-prompt-submit` (15 intents, 8 injection patterns), `pre-bash-guard`, `post-edit`, `stop`
- `scripts/gen.py` ‚Äî manifest-to-config generator (31 languages, 8 package managers, monorepos, serverless, data/ML, desktop)
- `scripts/auto-learn.py`, `self-improve.py`, `version-bump.py`, `changelog-gen.py`
- `install.sh` ‚Äî one-liner installer (`curl -fsSL .../install.sh | bash`)
- 4 pre-filled example manifests (web-app, api, ml, mobile)
- `project.manifest.json` ‚Äî single source of truth for stack, workflow, guards, agents, MCP servers
- CI: `validate.yml` (syntax + JSON + HANDOFF coverage + gen.py end-to-end), `release.yml` (auto GitHub Release + tag)
- Branch protection on main (CI required, 1 review, no force push)
